lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The old Victorian house had been in Maya’s family for generations, accumulating more than just dust in its shadowy corners. When her grandmother passed, a final, peculiar item was listed in the will: a mirror from the late 1800s, described only as 'The Looking Glass of Whispers.'

lines.speaker: Maya
lines.text: Honestly, I don't know where Grandma even kept this thing. It's huge. And heavy.

lines.speaker: Liam
lines.text: Seriously. My back is going to sue me. Are you sure you want this in your bedroom? It looks like something out of a haunted mansion movie.

lines.speaker: Chloe
lines.text: Oh, I love it! Look at the detail on the frame. It’s magnificent, Maya. Think of the stories it could tell.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Or the dust bunnies it could collect. Here, a little more to the left, Liam. No, your left.

lines.speaker: Liam
lines.text: My left is your right, apparently. Just tell me when it's centered.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: After much straining and a few near-misses with the wall, the mirror was finally propped against the far wall of Maya's bedroom, facing her antique four-poster bed.

lines.speaker: Maya
lines.text: Perfect. Thank you, guys, seriously. I couldn't have done that alone.

lines.speaker: Chloe
lines.text: It really transforms the room. It feels… grander now.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: And much darker, with that giant black hole sucking up all the light. Anyone else feel like it’s a little… off?

lines.speaker: Liam
lines.text: Off how? It's just an old mirror. Probably needs a good cleaning.

lines.speaker: Maya
lines.text: No, Sam's right. Look closely. My lamp… it's not quite where it should be in the reflection.

lines.speaker: Chloe
lines.text: Oh, you're right! It's shifted slightly to the left. But it's clearly on the right here. That's weird.

lines.speaker: Liam
lines.text: It's an antique mirror. The glass is probably warped. Or it's a trick of the light. Stand directly in front of it, Maya.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Maya stepped forward, her reflection appearing instantly. Her friends watched her, then her mirrored self.

lines.speaker: Maya
lines.text: Okay, now I see it. It's not just the lamp. My hair… I know I just tied it up, but in the reflection, it looks a little… messier. Like I've been running my hand through it.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: And the book on your nightstand. I swear it was open face down. In the mirror, it's closed.

lines.speaker: Chloe
lines.text: My scarf! I draped it over the chair, but in the reflection, it's on the floor next to it. Just barely.

lines.speaker: Liam
lines.text: Okay, that's… genuinely strange. This isn't just old glass. It’s like a slightly altered reality.

lines.speaker: Maya
lines.text: It's subtle, though. If you weren't looking for it, you wouldn't even notice. Like a tiny glitch.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Maybe it's one of those haunted mirrors, like in the urban legends? They say some can show you glimpses of the past, or even a different present.

lines.speaker: Chloe
lines.text: Or the future. Imagine if it showed something truly terrifying.

lines.speaker: Liam
lines.text: Let's not get ahead of ourselves. There's probably a scientific explanation. Refraction, angles, maybe a weird chemical in the silvering. I'll Google 'anomalous antique mirror reflections'.

lines.speaker: Maya
lines.text: No, wait. Look at my reflection again. My eyes. They just… moved. But I didn't.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: In the mirror, Maya's reflection, distinct and separate, turned its head almost imperceptibly, its gaze lingering on something just out of frame behind her.

lines.speaker: Chloe
lines.text: Did you see that? It looked… curious.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Curious about what? There's nothing there.

lines.speaker: Liam
lines.text: Okay, now that's a trick of the light. Or our minds playing tricks on us. We're all wired now to see things after what Maya said.

lines.speaker: Maya
lines.text: No, it wasn't. It felt… deliberate. And now, my reflection looks a little… sad. Or maybe worried.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The four friends stared into the ornate mirror, their own reflections looking back, perfectly normal. But Maya’s, standing directly in front of the glass, seemed to be conveying a different emotion entirely, a quiet anxiety that deepened with each passing second.

lines.speaker: Liam
lines.text: This is starting to creep me out. Maybe we should cover it for the night. Just until we figure out what's going on.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Good idea. I’m already getting chills. What if it gets worse when we're asleep?

lines.speaker: Chloe
lines.text: It feels like it's watching us. Especially Maya.

lines.speaker: Maya
lines.text: I’ll find an old sheet in the attic. Be right back.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Maya turned, heading for the bedroom door, her back to the mirror. As she reached the threshold, her reflection in the glass, still facing outward, slowly lifted a hand. It pressed a ghostly palm against the mirrored surface, as if trying to reach out from behind the glass.

scene_prompts: A wide shot of Maya's bedroom, showing a large, ornate antique mirror propped against a wall, slightly off-center. Dust motes dance in the sunlight from a window.
Close-up on Maya, looking at the mirror with a thoughtful, slightly concerned expression, wiping a bit of dust from the frame.
Liam, grunting with effort, trying to adjust the heavy mirror, a bead of sweat on his forehead. He looks exasperated.
Chloe, her eyes sparkling with artistic appreciation, tracing the intricate carvings on the mirror's frame.
Sam, holding up a smartphone, gesturing with his free hand, directing Liam where to move the mirror.
Liam rolls his eyes but complies, a strained grimace on his face.
The mirror now centered on the wall, reflecting the room. The friends stand back, looking at it.
A shot focusing on the mirror's reflection of Maya's bedroom, specifically the lamp on her nightstand, subtly shifted compared to the real lamp in the foreground.
Close-up on Maya's face, her brow furrowed in concentration as she notices the discrepancy.
Chloe leans in, pointing a finger towards the reflection of the lamp, her expression a mix of curiosity and surprise.
Liam, skeptical, shrugs, then squints at the mirror, trying to find a logical explanation.
Maya steps directly in front of the mirror, her reflection appearing.
A split shot: Maya in the foreground, her reflection in the background. The reflection's hair is slightly disheveled compared to Maya's neatly tied hair.
Sam points at the nightstand in the reflection, showing a closed book, while the real book is open facedown.
Chloe points at her scarf on the floor in the reflection, while it's draped over a chair in reality.
Liam's skeptical expression slowly morphs into one of genuine unease.
Maya stares intently at her reflection, then her eyes widen slightly as she notices something else.
Close-up on Maya's reflection in the mirror, her eyes subtly shifting, looking towards the side of the room, almost as if reacting to something unseen.
Chloe gasps softly, her hand flying to her mouth.
Sam's eyes dart between Maya and her reflection, confusion and growing fear on his face.
Liam shakes his head, trying to rationalize what he just saw, but his composure is visibly cracking.
Maya's reflection, still in the mirror, now holds a distinctly worried, almost pleading expression.
The four friends stand frozen, staring into the mirror, their faces pale.

Maya turns her back to the mirror, walking towards the door. Her reflection, however, remains facing the audience, slowly lifting a hand and pressing it against the mirrored surface, a chilling, silent gesture.
youtube_title: The Glitch in the Glass — Ep 1: The Mirror's Secret Reflection
youtube_description:
Maya inherits an antique mirror, but when she and her friends set it up, they discover its reflection shows a subtly altered, unsettling version of their world. What secrets does this 'Looking Glass of Whispers' truly hold? 

Subscribe for more chilling tales from Lights Out Tales! Original fiction.
tiktok_caption: Maya just inherited an antique mirror, but her reflection isn't quite right. What's wrong with this picture? 😵‍💫 #CreepyMirror #GlitchInTheGlass
pinned_comment: If you looked into a mirror and saw a 'glitch', what's the first thing you'd check?

title: The Glitch in the Glass — Ep 1: The Mirror's Secret Reflection
